skills.name: Fullstack Development
skills.label: fullstack
skills.desc: 7+ years shipping end-to-end products — React/TypeScript frontends on Python (Django, FastAPI, Flask) and .NET backends. Delivered scalable, secure, high-performance systems used by real clients.

skills.name: Agentic AI
skills.label: agentic
skills.desc: Design multi-agent LLM pipelines with typed Pydantic contracts (FactCheck → Write → Review → Publish). Built with Pydantic AI, OpenAI, durable checkpointing (Kitaru) and LLM observability (Langfuse).

skills.name: Frontend
skills.label: frontend
skills.desc: React, Redux, TypeScript — component-driven, responsive UIs. Built and optimized frontend for the Valohai MLOps platform.

skills.name: Backend & APIs
skills.label: backend
skills.desc: Django, FastAPI, Flask, Node/Express, .NET Core. REST API design, complex pipelines, multi-cloud integrations and Docker containers.

skills.name: AI / ML & Computer Vision
skills.label: aiml
skills.desc: PyTorch, Keras, OpenCV. CNNs, transfer learning, spatio-temporal activity recognition, real-time object detection & tracking on live camera feeds.

skills.name: Databases & Data
skills.label: data
skills.desc: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Celery. ETL/ELT pipelines, SQL & NoSQL, Azure Table / Cosmos DB.

skills.name: Cloud & DevOps
skills.label: cloud
skills.desc: AWS (EC2), Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, Git. On-premises and cloud deployments with containerized workloads.

skills.name: Languages
skills.label: languages
skills.desc: Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, C#, SQL, Java.

projects.name: AgentFlow — Agentic Article Pipeline
projects.desc: Production-style multi-agent AI workflow that fact-checks, drafts, reviews and publishes articles autonomously. Specialized agents with typed Pydantic contracts, durable Kitaru checkpoints, Langfuse tracing, and Google Drive publishing.

projects.name: Valohai Libraries Integration
projects.desc: Led end-to-end development of a reusable library integration across frontend, backend and APIs on the Valohai MLOps platform. GitHub integration, role-based access control, and isolated container execution used by multiple teams.

projects.name: Theft Alert System
projects.desc: Real-time theft detection using a spatio-temporal activity recognition model (SlowFast, transfer learning) trained on 450+ surveillance videos. Multi-threaded deployment handling live camera feeds and alerting security staff.

projects.name: Vision-based Customer Analytics
projects.desc: Detects and tracks shoppers across retail aisles, distinguishing passers-by, shoppers and staff. Generates dwell-time and aisle-engagement reports from live video.
